subcodes.first_line: O Isma'il, sent by the Friend and in communion with Him Who conversed with God, in this Most Great Prison at the time when [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسمعیل مرسل خلیل و مکلم کلیم در این سجن اعظم در هنگامیکه
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @knowledge; recognition of God, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @suffering and imprisonment
